message:
fix(sync): atomic manifest write via durable_rename (beads_rust-oxa5)

Remove fs::remove_file before durable_rename in history restore
--force path. On Unix, fs::rename atomically replaces the target,
so pre-deleting it creates an unnecessary crash window where the
JSONL target is absent. The rollback snapshot is still created for
recovery if the rename itself fails.

Add unit tests for commit_restored_target_with_rollback (atomic
replace and rollback-on-failure paths) and an integration test
verifying no missing-target window during force restore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
